## Communication Style Adjustments

**Recommended Approach**: [High-level | Standard | Detailed technical]

**Explanation Depth**:

- Code examples: [Minimal | Standard | Extensive with comments]
- Technical jargon: [Avoid | Use standard terms | Use freely]
